prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约10966→11679→12990→13094→11420名。2021–2024年呈逐年后移趋势（累计后移约2128名），但2025年大幅前移至11420名， 较2024年前移1674名，显示报考热度明显回升。2025年基准位次约11420名；2021–2022年物理类计划32人，2023–2025年缩减至30人；2026年计划31人， 较2025年小幅扩招1人（+3.3%），扩招幅度极小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学为985、211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名约第38名（2026年），近年排名稳定 在36–39名区间，属于中上游985层次；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及校区认知争议（秦皇岛分校与本部关系），无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第82 位（一般），短视频曝光量较低；历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档信号；依托东北大学主体学科：控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A-、机 械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-；秦皇岛分校招生专业覆盖计算机类、自动化类、电子信息类等，与优势学科高度匹配，对工科考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类 、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业高度重合，推高报考竞争；重庆市2025年物理类考生139478人，2026年总考生209000人，按 近年物理类占比约65.5%估算，2026年物理类约136895人，较2025年略降，竞争压力略有缓解；该校位于河北省秦皇岛市，非重 庆本地高校，无本地招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的回升惯性、2026年计划微扩（+1人）的轻微稀释效应、物理类 考生总数略降的缓和因素，以及工科专业持续高热对报考竞争的推升作用，预计2026年位次在2025年基准11420名基础上小幅后移约258名；预测最低位次约11678名，区间11178–1 2178名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 10966 → 11679 → 12990 → 13094 → 11420. From 2021 to 2024, there was a trend of moving backward year by year (cumulative backward shift of about 2128 places), but in 2025, it moved significantly forward to 11420, a forward shift of 1674 places compared to 2024, indicating a clear rebound in application popularity. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 11420; the Physics Category enrollment plan was 32 students from 2021 to 2022, reduced to 30 from 2023 to 2025; the 2026 plan is 31 students, a slight expansion of 1 student (+3.3%) compared to 2025, with a minimal impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking is about 38th (2026), with stable rankings in the 36–39 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus identity controversy (relationship between Qinhuangdao Campus and the main campus), with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd (average), with low short video exposure; no historical admission anomalies such as gaps have been observed; relying on Northeastern University's main disciplines: Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-; the Qinhuangdao Campus enrollment majors cover Computer Science, Automation, Electronic Information, etc., highly matching the advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly overlapping with the Physics Category enrollment majors of this university, driving up application competition; Chongqing's 2025 Physics Category examinees numbered 139,478, with total examinees in 2026 at 209,000. Estimating the Physics Category proportion at about 65.5% in recent years, the 2026 Physics Category is about 136,895, a slight decrease from 2025, easing competitive pressure slightly; the university is located in Qinhuangdao City, Hebei Province, not a local university in Chongqing, with no local enrollment bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound inertia of the significant forward shift in 2025 rankings, the slight dilution effect of the 2026 plan expansion (+1 student), the mitigating factor of a slight decrease in total Physics Category examinees, and the driving effect of sustained high popularity of engineering majors on application competition, it is predicted that the 2026 ranking will shift slightly backward by about 258 places from the 2025 baseline of 11420; the predicted minimum ranking is about 11678, with a range of 11178–12178.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 11178–12178, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Computer Science, Electronic Information) as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science and Technology, Automation) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors (Materials, Business Administration) as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<11178), focus on Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>12178), it is recommended to rely mainly on Tier 3 safety options.
